features.name: Single-page EPUB conversion
features.description: Convert any article URL to a clean EPUB via /api/convert. Playwright scrapes, readability-lxml extracts, ebooklib builds.
features.evidence: 41 backend tests pass. Deployed at epubanything.com.

features.name: Multi-page site detection and EPUB
features.description: Auto-detect course/docs nav structure, confirm page list with user, crawl all pages, build multi-chapter EPUB.
features.evidence: site_detector.py, build_site_epub() in epub_builder.py, SiteConfirmCard, /api/convert-site. All tests pass.

features.name: SSE conversion progress
features.description: Stream real-time 'Converting page N of M' progress via SSE during multi-page conversion. ProgressCard in frontend.
features.evidence: _stream_site_conversion generator, ProgressCard component, SSE-aware tests. Commit fa2373c.

features.name: Scraper concurrency cap
features.description: asyncio.Semaphore(5) in scraper.py prevents OOM when multiple users convert simultaneously.
